mnemonics: PEES (Power, Efficiency, End-of-Life, Sustainable Sourcing) - Think of the 'PEES' principles to remember the key areas of focus for sustainable use.
keyPoints: Optimize power management settings on devices to reduce energy consumption.
Promote the use of energy-efficient hardware and cloud services.
Extend product lifespan through proper maintenance and repairability to reduce e-waste.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on manufacturing and recycling, while ignoring the significant energy use phase.
Assuming all 'cloud' solutions are inherently green, without evaluating the energy source of the data center.
